properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can't forget I still remember The place You found me And I surrendered

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When Your grace covered my shame And saw my need You gave me hope Hope and a future

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My heart is Yours Now and forever I am loved Only because You first loved me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I love You Jesus I love Yes I love You Because You first loved me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your sacrifice Is overwhelming Suffered and died Because You loved me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm alive Only through Christ who first loved me Nothing can tear me away from Your love Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Nothing can separate your heart from mine Nothing can tear me away from Your love Lord I am Yours, I am Yours
